---
title: "OpenDomain in Snap Processor"
description: "Compare EXCLUDE, AS_IS and SNAP_ALL_SIDE in SnapGeometryProcessor with polygon references"
author: "Karel Dieussaert"
date: "2026-03-31"
categories: [OpenDomainStrategy, SnapGeometryProcessor, Process]
format:
  html:
    code-fold: false
jupyter: python3
---
# OpenDomain in SnapGeometryProcessor
This example demonstrates strategy differences for [SnapGeometryProcessor](../reference/SnapGeometryProcessor.qmd) when the reference layer is polygon-based.

## What you learn
1. How `EXCLUDE`, `AS_IS` and `SNAP_ALL_SIDE` differ.
2. How to inspect area and geometry type per strategy.

```{python}
{{< include ../../examples/example_opendomain_snap_polygon_reference.py >}}
```
